minecraft.note: Public Minecraft Java server hosted on AWS. Visitors join a normal, non-flat world in creative mode, talk to guide agents in-game, and watch the six landmark models dissolve and rebuild block by block.

dynamic.cadence: The same six OTS landmarks stay in their museum positions while a trusted builder unbuilds and rebuilds them in staggered loops.
dynamic.speed: Balanced server-safe animation, capped near 100 individual block edits per second across the museum.

recordings.title: Munich Famous Building
recordings.description: A one-shot OTS structure build with visible agent coordination and a centralized trusted builder.

recordings.title: Eiffel Tower
recordings.description: A landmark build showing structural planning, staged placement, and progress reporting.

recordings.title: Sydney Opera House
recordings.description: A cinematic imported-model build with bots moving around the active layer perimeter.

recordings.title: Arc de Triomphe
recordings.description: A high-detail prebuilt GrabCraft model converted into OTS blocks for the public museum.

recordings.title: Saint Basil's Cathedral
recordings.description: A colorful high-detail GrabCraft model converted into OTS blocks for visual contrast.

recordings.title: NY Chrysler Building
recordings.description: A tall skyline model converted from a prebuilt GrabCraft structure into OTS blocks.

landmarks.name: Munich Famous Building
landmarks.description: Exact OTS structure placement near spawn, now rebuilt bottom-to-top after each top-down dissolve cycle.

landmarks.name: Eiffel Tower
landmarks.description: High-detail prebuilt GrabCraft Eiffel model converted into OTS blocks, rebuilt in visible lower-to-upper construction passes.

landmarks.name: Sydney Opera House
landmarks.description: Imported OTS model in the visible front row, far left with a white marker and a staggered rebuild phase.

landmarks.name: Arc de Triomphe
landmarks.description: High-detail prebuilt GrabCraft model converted into OTS blocks, unbuilt only at known model coordinates and rebuilt from the base upward.

landmarks.name: Saint Basil's Cathedral
landmarks.description: Colorful prebuilt GrabCraft cathedral model converted into OTS blocks, cycling through visible dissolve and restoration phases.

landmarks.name: NY Chrysler Building
landmarks.description: Tall prebuilt GrabCraft skyscraper model converted into OTS blocks, animated carefully because it has the largest block count.

agents.name: OpenAI Orchestrator
agents.activity: Routes user requests, coordinates agents, and announces each live dissolve and rebuild phase.

agents.name: Design Dora
agents.activity: Reviews site layout, paths, plaza framing, visitor flow, and safe viewing positions during animation.

agents.name: Build Bea
agents.activity: Monitors staging, lower layers, framing, walls, roofs, and bottom-to-top rebuild order.

agents.name: Monument Marc
agents.activity: Checks imported landmark silhouette, masonry, recognizable details, and final restored profiles.

agents.name: Supply Sid
agents.activity: Tracks palette, utilities, glazing, and whether each restored block matches the OTS source.

agents.name: Forest Finn
agents.activity: Watches exterior paths, garden edges, greenery, and cleanup while the landmark blocks animate.
